reasoning_content:
Now I understand the issue. Task 2 uses a hand-written lexer (`SYsULexer.cpp`) that reads the output of Task 1 (the token stream). It parses the token stream output format and maps clang token names back to ANTLR token types. The `SYsULexer.tokens` file only has 15 token types, but now our Task 1 lexer outputs many more token types (like `const`, `star`, `if`, `else`, etc.).

I need to:
1. Update `SYsULexer.tokens` to include all the new token types
2. Update `SYsULexer.cpp`'s `kClangTokens` mapping to include all the new clang token names
3. Update `SYsULexer.hpp` if needed

Let me also check how `SYsULexer.tokens.hpp` is generated.
